productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Solid White Shorts
description: Composition White Official Merchandise manchester united jersey shorts made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester has elasticated waistband with drawcord tie at inner front, two side seam pockets, curved yoke back, brand badge appliqué on left thigh and two black stripes curving around side seams Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron, do not iron on print Dress for comfort with these Official Merchandise Manchester United football Club shorts. These soft and comfortable shorts pay homage to the incredibly successful team with bold club badge on the front. Team this with a tee for a game of footie or for relaxing at home when only the genuine Man U article will do. Model statistics The product is a size M, length 18”, on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
